## Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to break)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🧹 Code refactor or cleanup

## Developer Checklist
- [ ] Is the versioning adapted in the script?
- [ ] Is the versioning adapted in `Release.txt`?
- [ ] I have verified that no images or unnecessary binary files were uploaded to the repository.
- [ ] My code follows the existing style and structure of the project.
